title: Chewy Blossom Muffin
description: A floral, chewy muffin dish inspired by Portuguese cuisine, perfect for sick days or as a dessert option, nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to sift it first.

ingredients.name: Almond milk
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is at room temperature.

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease muffin cups or line them with paper liners.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the coconut sugar and all-purpose flour until well combined. Add baking powder and stir briefly.
Add almond milk and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth but do not overmix. The batter should be slightly thick.
Fold in peach puree and sunflower seeds gently. If using rose petals, add them at this stage for a decorative touch.
Divide the batter evenly among prepared muffin cups. Sprinkle a few rose petals or seeds on top of each muffin for an extra pop of color and texture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let them cool in their tins before removing to avoid crumbling.
